---
title: Slidebreak Example
format: 
  html: default
  revealjs: 
    output-file: example-slides.html
filters:
  - d-morrison/slidebreak
---

## First Slide

Some content here.

{{< slidebreak >}}

more content

## Second Titled Slide

More content on a new slide.

## Third Titled Slide

And even more content on another new slide.
